hero.title: .NET & Blazor Developer
hero.tagline: Building fast, modern web applications with C# and WebAssembly.
about.title: About Me
about.bio1.start: I'm a passionate .NET developer with a focus on building modern web applications using
about.bio1.end: and the .NET ecosystem. I enjoy crafting clean, performant UIs that run directly in the browser — no JavaScript framework required.
about.bio2: When I'm not writing C#, I explore system design, contribute to open-source projects, and stay on top of the latest developments in the .NET world. I believe in writing maintainable code and shipping products that users love.
techstack.title: Tech Stack
projects.title: Projects
projects.portfolio.name: Portfolio Site
projects.portfolio.desc: This portfolio — a single-page Blazor WebAssembly app hosted on GitHub Pages. Dark-mode design with smooth scroll navigation.
projects.taskmanager.name: Task Manager API
projects.taskmanager.desc: RESTful API built with ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework Core, and PostgreSQL. Implements Clean Architecture with CQRS patterns.
projects.chat.name: Real-time Chat
projects.chat.desc: SignalR-powered chat application with rooms, presence indicators, and message history stored in Redis.
experience.title: Experience
experience.bullet1.1: Developed and maintained Blazor WebAssembly applications for enterprise clients.
experience.bullet1.2: Designed RESTful APIs with ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework Core.
experience.bullet1.3: Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps.
experience.bullet2.1: Built internal tooling with Blazor Server and SQL Server.
experience.bullet2.2: Participated in code reviews and contributed to architecture discussions.
experience.bullet2.3: Improved application performance by optimizing EF Core queries.
education.title: Education
education.desc1: Thesis topic: "Modeling an investment portfolio using machine learning techniques"
education.desc2: Thesis topic: "Training plan generator for runners"
contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.intro: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, want to collaborate, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.
